{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303002609E391F162A56AC26979"}"},"total":37},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6952760552607318053","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好看啊，继续一路开挂，不要变回去，记住了哦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1618815720,"group_id":"6936274085424925709","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望大家喜欢我的小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwj1SD1uWOBXoIY8XiansjU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7093737bba204407b96c37d69012c164~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795701&x-signature=L8GwsJpa0AbuJUzwvLZwgC0%2BQL4%3D","user_id":"527412664993646","user_name":"作者movqn7"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"527412664993646","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705311127,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6936274085424925709","book_info":{"abstract":"记者：“陈同学，我们都知道，你在刚刚结束的高考中考了满分，这是前所未有的事情。我想问一下，作为一名学霸，你有什么……”
陈小帅打断了她：“对不起，我要纠正你一个说法，请不要叫我学霸。如果非要有个称呼，叫我【霸霸】就好。”
记者一脸黑线：？？？
我就采访下你，还多出个爹来？
陈小帅看对方脸色不对，笑着解释道：“你误会了，我并不是占你便宜。因为学霸这个词，已经不足以形容我。在我面前，谁敢说自己是学霸？我是学霸中的学霸，简称【霸霸】。
记者勉强笑道：“那陈同学有什么经验和大家分享的吗？”
“经验嘛，好像还真没有，我平时不怎么听课。上课时间就看看小说，睡睡觉，然后不知怎么地，一考试就是满分。”陈小帅一摊手，无奈道：“哎，可能是太聪明了吧，我也没辙。”
记者：!!!
